name: Solid Fill
description: Solid white button with hover invert
css: .btn { background: #f5f5f5; color: #080808; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.2s; } .btn:hover { background: #080808; color: #f5f5f5; outline: 1.5px solid #f5f5f5; }
